title: Romantic Pink Roses Bouquet Building Set with Vase & LED Light, 845PCS Flowers Botanical Building Blocks Toys, Gifts for for Her & Him, Artificial Fake Flowers for Office Home Decor & Display
features: 【Please Note that These are 3.6MM Mini Building Bricks - Not Compatible with Major Brands!】

【Enchanting Rose Building Set】Let the soft shades of pink grace your fingertips. This exquisite flower building block set features three uniquely captivating roses: the richly alluring Freud Rose, the elegant and sophisticated Champagne Rose, and the tenderly romantic Pink Rose. Beyond the blooms, delicate palm leaves, dreamy lavender, graceful baby's breath, and fresh daisies complete the arrangement—each petal and sepals meticulously crafted with intricate textures to capture nature's authenticity.

【Elegant DIY Vase Building Block Kit】Designed with a sleek silhouette, this vase features a gently tapered neck that holds each stem securely in place—preventing spills while allowing blooms to unfold naturally. Roses take center stage, daisies nestle softly beside them, and palm leaves rest gently against the edge—each plant finds its perfect spot. Beautiful on its own as a sculptural piece, it also blends effortlessly with other décor to instantly elevate your home's aesthetic.

【Soft & Warm LED Lighting】This flowers bouquet building set includes a flexible LED light strip—a romantic and subtle accent. Its slim, discreet design allows it to be gently wrapped around flower stems. With a simple touch, a warm golden glow shines through the petals and textured floral blocks, casting a dreamy light over the blossoms after dark, making the entire floral arrangement radiate with elegance. Transform ordinary nights into something extraordinary.

【Timeless Romantic Indoor Decor】Fresh flowers fade, but this botanical collection holds onto beauty forever. Expertly designed with astonishing realism, it keeps your space filled with color and life—day after day. Ideal for those who appreciate lasting elegance with minimal upkeep, this bouquet brings continuous color and life to any setting. Wherever it goes, it effortlessly becomes a focal point, a piece that speaks quietly but profoundly to your taste and sentiment.

【The Perfect Heartfelt Gift】Looking for a gift that truly stands out? This exquisite bouquet building set for adults is more than just a gift — it’s a physical expression of love, care, and heartfelt consideration. Ideal for Valentine’s Day, birthdays, Mother’s Day, or anniversaries, this handcrafted work of art is made to last, unlike fresh flowers that fade in days. It captures an emotion that only grows deeper with time.
